documents.content:
# Grounded Boundary (Dead Ends)

9 of 9 heavy-backtest candidates are currently rejected.

## Common Rejection Patterns

- breakout_open_interest_confirmation: 3 rejections
- ema_pullback_long: 2 rejections
- bollinger_squeeze_breakout: 2 rejections
- unknown: 1 rejections
- funding_mean_revert: 1 rejections

## Active Contradictions (9)

- btc-15m-volatility-compression-breakout-psychology_no_chase-variety-session-stability-filter-variety-executio-186746c251-sparse_signal: sparse_signal (priority 0.99)
